flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at La Roche University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (786 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at La Roche University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.6k → $21.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at La Roche University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (932 → 751).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at La Roche University fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (70.9% → 58.6%).
